sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115045" key="xruswruxi/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρῡσωρῠχ-ίτης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῑ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n115045.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gold-extractor, alchemist,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ὧρος ὁ χ.</foreign> Olymp.Alch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0545.tlg001:p.103B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.103B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
